capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a data management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a data management service.

questions.prompt: Is the data management service reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the data management service reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent data management service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the Data Management?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the Data Management.
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for data management

questions.prompt: Are the KPIs and KRIs for the Data Management reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are the KPIs and KRIs for the Data Management reviewed frequently.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a data management platform to effectively manage the enterprise data asset lifecycle?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a data management platform to effectively manage the enterprise data asset lifecycle.
questions.evaluation_focus: Data management platform for data asset lifecycle

questions.prompt: Does the data management platform cover the data from the entire enterprise and its subsidiaries?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the data management platform cover the data from the entire enterprise and its subsidiaries.

questions.prompt: Does the data management platform have capabilities to provide automation to certain processes in the data lifecycle?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the data management platform have capabilities to provide automation to certain processes in the data lifecycle.

questions.prompt: Is the data management platform configuration reviewed for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the data management platform configuration reviewed for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the data management platform integrate with other systems like vulnerability management, asset management, and compliance management to provide contextual information that is data rich?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the data management platform integrate with other systems like vulnerability management, asset management, and compliance management to provide contextual information that is data rich.
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with vulnerability, asset, and compliance systems

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented process for data management?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented process for data management.

questions.prompt: Does the data management process apply to all data segments of the enterprise or only specific data assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the data management process apply to all data segments of the enterprise or only specific data assets.
questions.evaluation_focus: Process scope across all or specific data segments

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise utilize the automation capabilities provided by the data management platform?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise utilize the automation capabilities provided by the data management platform.

questions.prompt: Is the data management process reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the data management process reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an information security and data governance program that is applicable enterprise wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have an information security and data governance program that is applicable enterprise wide.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide information security and data governance program

questions.prompt: Is the information security and data governance program reviewed frequently to measure efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the information security and data governance program reviewed frequently to measure efficacy.

questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented policy and process for data provisioning.

questions.prompt: Is the policy and process for data provisioning reviewed frequently to measure efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the policy and process for data provisioning reviewed frequently to measure efficacy.

questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented policy and process for data deprovisioning.

questions.prompt: Is the policy and process for data deprovisioning reviewed frequently to measure efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the policy and process for data deprovisioning reviewed frequently to measure efficacy.

questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented policy and process for data modification.

questions.prompt: Is the policy and process for data modification reviewed frequently to measure efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the policy and process for data modification reviewed frequently to measure efficacy.

questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented policy and process for data retention on network devices.

questions.prompt: Is the policy and process for data retention on network devices reviewed frequently to measure efficacy?

questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise hire a data and privacy officer to architect and maintain the enterprise data governance model.
questions.evaluation_focus: Data and privacy officer for enterprise data governance

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented data architecture that is applicable enterprise wide?

questions.prompt: Is the data architecture reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the data architecture reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the data platform enforce secure communication between all data assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the data platform enforce secure communication between all data assets.
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure communication between all data assets

questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented data modelling that is applicable enterprise wide.

questions.prompt: Is the data model reviewed frequently for efficacy?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy data loss prevention mechanisms to prevent data exfiltration?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise deploy data loss prevention mechanisms to prevent data exfiltration.
questions.evaluation_focus: DLP mechanisms to prevent data exfiltration

questions.prompt: Are DLP deployed enterprise wide at both network and endpoint level?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are DLP deployed enterprise wide at both network and endpoint level.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide DLP at network and endpoint

questions.prompt: Are DLP design and configuration reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are DLP design and configuration reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent DLP design and configuration review

questions.prompt: Do DLP solutions integrate with multiple decision points or systems like policy management systems to take contextual decisions regarding data and also to provide information regarding subjects and objects keeping data in mind?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Do DLP solutions integrate with multiple decision points or systems like policy management systems to take contextual decisions regarding data and also to provide information regarding subjects and objects keeping data in mind.
questions.evaluation_focus: DLP integration with policy and contextual decision systems

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented policy for encryption of data at rest on all applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented policy for encryption of data at rest on all applications.

questions.prompt: Is the application encryption policy reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the application encryption policy reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented policy for encryption of data at rest on all endpoint devices.

questions.prompt: Is the endpoint device encryption policy reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the endpoint device encryption policy reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Is the network devices data at rest and in motion encryption policy reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the network devices data at rest and in motion encryption policy reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the data management platform have capability to measure and report changes in data quality and integrity?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the data management platform have capability to measure and report changes in data quality and integrity.

questions.prompt: Are all data assets monitored for quality and integrity?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are all data assets monitored for quality and integrity.

questions.prompt: Are data asset quality checks and validation automated as part of the data management system?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are data asset quality checks and validation automated as part of the data management system.

questions.prompt: Does the data quality information get incorporated into multiple systems like data management and asset management?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the data quality information get incorporated into multiple systems like data management and asset management.
questions.evaluation_focus: Data quality information incorporated into other systems

questions.prompt: Does the data management platform have capability to classify data assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the data management platform have capability to classify data assets.

questions.prompt: Are all data assets classified?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are all data assets classified.

questions.intent: Evaluate: Are data assets classification automated.

questions.prompt: Does the data asset classification get incorporated into multiple systems like data management and asset management?

questions.prompt: Are data asset classification reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are data asset classification reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise define and implement a process for conducting security assessments periodically for all organizations within the supply chain.
questions.evaluation_focus: Periodic supply chain security assessment process

questions.prompt: Is the data supply chain process reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the data supply chain process reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Is risk assessment performed for the data supply chain automated?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is risk assessment performed for the data supply chain automated.

questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the data management platform have capability to label data assets.

questions.intent: Evaluate: Are all data assets labelled.

questions.intent: Evaluate: Are data assets labelling automated.

questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the data asset labelling get incorporated into multiple systems like data management and asset management.

questions.prompt: Are data asset labelling reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are data asset labelling reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have capability to capture data flows automatically.

questions.prompt: Are the mapped data flows reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are the mapped data flows reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise maintain a master data record for all assets in the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise maintain a master data record for all assets in the enterprise.
questions.evaluation_focus: Master data record for all enterprise assets

questions.prompt: Are changes to the master data record and subsequent records and manipulation of the master data record automated by the data management platform?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are changes to the master data record and subsequent records and manipulation of the master data record automated by the data management platform.

questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the data management platform have capabilities to audit and identify changes to the master data record.
questions.evaluation_focus: Audit and identify master data record changes

questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have data warehousing capabilities.

questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise review the data modification process for efficacy.

questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented process for managing data provisioning across all locations.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise review the data deprovisioning process for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise review the data deprovisioning process for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Are there multiple paths to access data assets in case of a network or data controller failure?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are there multiple paths to access data assets in case of a network or data controller failure.
questions.evaluation_focus: Multiple paths to access data assets during failure

questions.prompt: Are alternative locations or networks selected and rerouted automatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are alternative locations or networks selected and rerouted automatically.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic alternate location or network rerouting

questions.prompt: Are data resiliency measures started automatically, or do they need to be manually triggered?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are data resiliency measures started automatically, or do they need to be manually triggered.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic or manual data resiliency measures

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have RPO/RTO metrics defined as per availability policy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have RPO/RTO metrics defined as per availability policy.
questions.evaluation_focus: RPO/RTO metrics defined per availability policy

questions.prompt: Are the RPO and RTO metrics applicable enterprise wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are the RPO and RTO metrics applicable enterprise wide.

questions.prompt: Are the RPO and RTO metrics reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are the RPO and RTO metrics reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a documented and formalized backup policy and process in place?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a documented and formalized backup policy and process in place.
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented formalized backup policy and process

questions.prompt: Are backups stored at remote locations or locally on the devices?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are backups stored at remote locations or locally on the devices.

questions.prompt: Are backups taken automatically at specific intervals of time?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are backups taken automatically at specific intervals of time.

questions.prompt: Are full and incremental or differential backups taken?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are full and incremental or differential backups taken.
questions.evaluation_focus: Full and incremental or differential backups

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise measure how much time it takes to restore each specific technology product back to its original config based on RTO and RPO?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise measure how much time it takes to restore each specific technology product back to its original config based on RTO and RPO.
questions.evaluation_focus: Restore time measurement against RTO and RPO

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise review backup policies and processes for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise review backup policies and processes for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent backup policy and process review

questions.prompt: Are backup processes automated as part of broader asset management system?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are backup processes automated as part of broader asset management system.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated backup as part of asset management

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented process on data retention on multiple platforms including network, applications, and devices?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented process on data retention on multiple platforms including network, applications, and devices.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have formalized and documented hierarchy for data ownership and custodianship especially for data that is owned by customers?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have formalized and documented hierarchy for data ownership and custodianship especially for data that is owned by customers.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized data ownership and custodianship hierarchy

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a clear ownership trail of all data assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a clear ownership trail of all data assets.
questions.evaluation_focus: Clear ownership trail for all data assets

questions.prompt: Are data ownership and permissions reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are data ownership and permissions reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy secure transfer methods for data movement and migration?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise deploy secure transfer methods for data movement and migration.
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure transfer methods for data movement and migration

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise make sure that transfer of personal or sensitive data is protected from unauthorized access and only processed within scope as permitted by the respective laws and regulations?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise make sure that transfer of personal or sensitive data is protected from unauthorized access and only processed within scope as permitted by the respective laws and regulations.
questions.evaluation_focus: Protection of personal and sensitive data within regulatory scope

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have rules or laws abiding to specific regulation relating to what locations data can be stored? This is especially relevant for cloud environments where the cloud provider does not have a point of presence in the desired locations.
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have rules or laws abiding to specific regulation relating to what locations data can be stored? This is especially relevant for cloud environments where the cloud provider does not have a point of presence in the desired locations..

questions.prompt: Are location restrictions for data reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are location restrictions for data reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process for logging data asset based lifecycle logs and activity to SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is there a formal documented process for logging data asset based lifecycle logs and activity to SOC.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formal process for logging data asset lifecycle to SOC

questions.prompt: Is logging of data asset management logs made securely to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is logging of data asset management logs made securely to the SOC.
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure logging of data asset management logs to SOC

questions.prompt: Are dynamic changes to the data asset state and asset activity captured and transferred to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are dynamic changes to the data asset state and asset activity captured and transferred to the SOC.
questions.evaluation_focus: Dynamic data asset state changes captured and transferred to SOC
